name: Encoded Command Malicious Usage in a Programming Environment
notes: This rule triggers when an encoded command is used in a programming environment type cmd or Powershell.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Encoded Argument (custom) is not N/A
when the event matches "Process Name" MATCHES '((powershell)|(cmd))\.exe' AQL filter query

when the event matches REPLACEALL('[\+\-\s\.\^\"\'']', DECODERS::BASE64DECODE("Encoded Argument"), '') MATCHES '((.*NewObject(System)?NetWebClient.*DownloadFile.*((StartProcess)|(shellexecute)|(win32_process)|(start)|(saps)).*)|(.*((iex)|(InvokeExpression)).*NewObject(System)?NetWebClient.*DownloadString.*)|(.*NewObject(System)?NetWebClient.*DownloadString.*((iex)|(InvokeExpression)).*)|(.*IEX.*\[SystemDiagnosticsProcess\]\:\:Start.*)|(.*StartBitsTransfer.*InvokeItem.*))' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Encoded Command Malicious Usage in a Programming Environment on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Encoded Argument (custom) is not N/A
AND when the event matches "Process Name" MATCHES '((powershell)|(cmd))\.exe' AQL filter query

AND when the event matches REPLACEALL('[\+\-\s\.\^\"\'']', DECODERS::BASE64DECODE("Encoded Argument"), '') MATCHES '((.*NewObject(System)?NetWebClient.*DownloadFile.*((StartProcess)|(shellexecute)|(win32_process)|(start)|(saps)).*)|(.*((iex)|(InvokeExpression)).*NewObject(System)?NetWebClient.*DownloadString.*)|(.*NewObject(System)?NetWebClient.*DownloadString.*((iex)|(InvokeExpression)).*)|(.*IEX.*\[SystemDiagnosticsProcess\]\:\:Start.*)|(.*StartBitsTransfer.*InvokeItem.*))' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Encoded Command Malicious Usage in a Programming Environment
Event description: Detects when an encoded command is used in a programming environment type cmd or Powershell.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
Add the "sourceIP" of the event or flow payload to the Reference Set "Compromised Hosts"
